title: EyeSpeak – Accessibility Web App
description: Built a web app using eye-tracking to help disabled and elderly users draw and communicate hands-free, integrating WebGazer.js and text-to-speech.

title: Friends Reboot Episode Analyzer

title: Image Converter Tool

description: Built an AI-driven system to process financial spreadsheets and generate structured performance reports using statistical methods.

title: Investment Performance Analysis
description: Analyzed asset performance using information coefficients, t-statistics, and annualized returns to identify trends and outliers.

title: Portfolio Data Automation
description: Created automated workflows to organize and summarize portfolio data for internal investment review.

description: Designed structured datasets and CRM workflows to support large-scale client outreach and lead generation.

title: Customer Service Optimization

title: Recipe & Nutrition Data Analysis

title: Grocery Cost vs Protein Analysis
